title: Alma mater (song)

infobox.value: This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["List of school songs"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22List+of+school+songs%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22List+of+school+songs%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(June 2007)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))*

[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22List+of+school+songs%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22List+of+school+songs%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(June 2007)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

or **school anthem** is the patronal [song](/wiki/Song "Song") of a [school](/wiki/School "School"). In [England](/wiki/England "England"), this tradition is particularly strong in [public schools](/wiki/Independent_school_(UK) "Independent school (UK)") and [grammar schools](/wiki/Grammar_schools_in_the_United_Kingdom "Grammar schools in the United Kingdom").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Alma mater (song)](/w/index.php?title=Alma_mater_(song)&redirect=no "Alma mater (song)"))

List of hymns or anthems of educational institutions

Not to be confused with  [fight songs](/wiki/Fight_song "Fight song"), songs used to represent a school or sports team in an athletic setting.

"Alma mater (song)" redirects here. For songs titled "Alma Mater", see [Alma mater (disambiguation) § Music](/wiki/Alma_mater_(disambiguation)#Music "Alma mater (disambiguation)").

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/List_of_school_songs "Special:EditPage/List of school songs") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["List of school songs"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22List+of+school+songs%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22List+of+school+songs%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22List+of+school+songs%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(June 2007)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

A **school song**, **alma mater**,[[1]](#cite_note-1) **school hymn** or **school anthem** is the patronal [song](/wiki/Song "Song") of a [school](/wiki/School "School"). In [England](/wiki/England "England"), this tradition is particularly strong in [public schools](/wiki/Independent_school_(UK) "Independent school (UK)") and [grammar schools](/wiki/Grammar_schools_in_the_United_Kingdom "Grammar schools in the United Kingdom").

## Australia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Australia")]

* [Somerville House](/wiki/Somerville_House "Somerville House") — *[Our God, Our Help in Ages Past](/wiki/Our_God,_Our_Help_in_Ages_Past "Our God, Our Help in Ages Past")*
* [The Glennie School](/wiki/The_Glennie_School "The Glennie School") — *[Now Thank We All Our God](/wiki/Now_Thank_We_All_Our_God "Now Thank We All Our God")*
* [St Aloysius College](/wiki/St_Aloysius%27_College_(Sydney) "St Aloysius' College (Sydney)") — The Blue and Gold Forever[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Canada

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Canada")]

* [Bishop's College School](/wiki/Bishop%27s_College_School "Bishop's College School") — *[And did those feet in ancient time](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time") (Jerusalem)* & *Lennoxville Vivat Dicimus*
* [Cape Breton University](/wiki/Cape_Breton_University "Cape Breton University") — "[Rise Again](/wiki/Rise_Again_(The_Rankin_Family_song) "Rise Again (The Rankin Family song)")"
* [Upper Canada College](/wiki/Upper_Canada_College "Upper Canada College") — *[Praise My Soul, the King of Heaven](/wiki/Praise_My_Soul,_the_King_of_Heaven "Praise My Soul, the King of Heaven")*

## England

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: England")]

* [Barnard Castle School](/wiki/Barnard_Castle_School "Barnard Castle School") — "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")"
* [Charterhouse School](/wiki/Charterhouse_School "Charterhouse School") — "Carmen Carthusianum"
* [Douai School](/wiki/Douai_School "Douai School") — "[Ad Multos Annos](/wiki/Ad_multos_annos "Ad multos annos")"
* [Haberdashers' Aske's Boys' School](/wiki/Haberdashers%27_Aske%27s_Boys%27_School "Haberdashers' Aske's Boys' School") — "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")"
* [Harrow School](/wiki/Harrow_School "Harrow School") — "[Forty Years On](/wiki/Forty_Years_On_(song) "Forty Years On (song)")"
* [King Edward VI Grammar School, Chelmsford](/wiki/King_Edward_VI_Grammar_School,_Chelmsford "King Edward VI Grammar School, Chelmsford") — "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")"
* [Loughborough Grammar School](/wiki/Loughborough_Grammar_School "Loughborough Grammar School") — "Our Father, by Whose Servants"
* [Millfield School](/wiki/Millfield "Millfield") — [Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")
* [The London Oratory School](/wiki/London_Oratory_School "London Oratory School") — "Quam Bonum Est"
* [Oundle School](/wiki/Oundle_School "Oundle School") — "[Carmen Undeliense](/wiki/Carmen_Undeliense "Carmen Undeliense")"
* [Reigate Grammar School](/wiki/Reigate_Grammar_School "Reigate Grammar School") — "[To Be a Pilgrim](/wiki/To_Be_a_Pilgrim "To Be a Pilgrim")"
* [Sherborne School](/wiki/Sherborne_School "Sherborne School") — *The Carmen*[[3]](#cite_note-3)
* [Sir William Turner's Grammar School](/wiki/Sir_William_Turner%27s_Grammar_School "Sir William Turner's Grammar School") - "[Gaudeamus igitur](/wiki/Gaudeamus_igitur "Gaudeamus igitur")"
* [Stamford High School](/wiki/Stamford_High_School,_Lincolnshire "Stamford High School, Lincolnshire") — “Within these walls of grey”
* [The Judd School](/wiki/The_Judd_School "The Judd School") — "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")"
* [The Latymer School](/wiki/The_Latymer_School "The Latymer School") — "The Latymer School Song"[[4]](#cite_note-:1-4)
* [The Leys School](/wiki/The_Leys_School "The Leys School") — "Χαίρετε"[[5]](#cite_note-5)
* [The Skinners' School](/wiki/The_Skinners%27_School "The Skinners' School") — "[The Leopard Song](/wiki/The_Skinners%27_School#The_Leopard_song "The Skinners' School")"
* [Tonbridge School](/wiki/Tonbridge_School "Tonbridge School") — "Of Him Who Dreamed of Founding"[[6]](#cite_note-6)
* [William Hulme's Grammar School](/wiki/William_Hulme%27s_Grammar_School "William Hulme's Grammar School") — "The Hulme Song" and "[Jerusalem](/wiki/And_did_those_feet_in_ancient_time "And did those feet in ancient time")"

## India

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: India")]

* Carmel Convent High School, Durgapur — *[Within Thy Hallowed Portals Carmel Dear](/w/index.php?title=Carmel_Convent_High_School,_Durgapur&action=edit&redlink=1 "Carmel Convent High School, Durgapur (page does not exist)")*
* [Cathedral School, Lucknow](/wiki/Cathedral_School_of_Lucknow "Cathedral School of Lucknow") — *[We'll Raise The Banner Of Our School, And See It Flying High](/wiki/Cathedral_School_of_Lucknow "Cathedral School of Lucknow")*
* [Loyola School, Thiruvananthapuram](/wiki/Loyola_School,_Thiruvananthapuram "Loyola School, Thiruvananthapuram") — *[Cheer Loyola's sons](/wiki/Loyola_School,_Thiruvananthapuram#School_song "Loyola School, Thiruvananthapuram")*
* [St. Ann's High School, Secunderabad](/wiki/St._Ann%27s_High_School,_Secunderabad "St. Ann's High School, Secunderabad") — *[Scenes Of Our Childhood](/wiki/St._Ann%27s_High_School,_Secunderabad#Scenes_Of_Our_Childhood "St. Ann's High School, Secunderabad")*
* [St. Paul's School, Darjeeling](/wiki/St._Paul%27s_School,_Darjeeling "St. Paul's School, Darjeeling") — *[The Alma mater](/wiki/St._Paul%27s_School,_Darjeeling#The_Alma_mater "St. Paul's School, Darjeeling")*

## Japan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Japan")]

* [Doshisha University](/wiki/Doshisha_University "Doshisha University") — *[Doshisha College Song](https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/ja:Doshisha_College_Song "s:ja:Doshisha College Song")*[[7]](#cite_note-7)
* [Hokkaido University](/wiki/Hokkaido_University "Hokkaido University") — *[Tokoshie no Sachi](/w/index.php?title=Tokoshie_no_Sachi&action=edit&redlink=1 "Tokoshie no Sachi (page does not exist)") [[ja](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%8C%97%E6%B5%B7%E9%81%93%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6#校歌 "ja:北海道大学")]*[[8]](#cite_note-8)
* [Hosei University](/wiki/Hosei_University "Hosei University") — *[Hosei University School Song](/w/index.php?title=Hosei_University_School_Song&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hosei University School Song (page does not exist)") [[ja](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%B3%95%E6%94%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6#校歌 "ja:法政大学")]*[[9]](#cite_note-9)
* [Kansai University](/wiki/Kansai_University "Kansai University") — *[Kansai University Song](/w/index.php?title=Kansai_University_Song&action=edit&redlink=1 "Kansai University Song (page does not exist)") [[ja](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E9%96%A2%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6#学歌・応援歌 "ja:関西大学")]*[[10]](#cite_note-10)
* [Keio University](/wiki/Keio_University "Keio University") — *Keio University College Song*[[11]](#cite_note-11)
* [Kwansei Gakuin University](/wiki/Kwansei_Gakuin_University "Kwansei Gakuin University") — *[Sora no Tsubasa](https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/ja:%E7%A9%BA%E3%81%AE%E7%BF%BC "s:ja:空の翼")*[[12]](#cite_note-12)
* [Meiji University](/wiki/Meiji_University "Meiji University") — *[Meiji University School Song](https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/ja:%E6%98%8E%E6%B2%BB%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6%E6%A0%A1%E6%AD%8C "s:ja:明治大学校歌")*[[13]](#cite_note-13)
* [Rikkyo University](/wiki/Rikkyo_University "Rikkyo University") — *[Eikou no Rikkyo](/w/index.php?title=Eikou_no_Rikkyo&action=edit&redlink=1 "Eikou no Rikkyo (page does not exist)") [[ja](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E7%AB%8B%E6%95%99%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6#校歌 "ja:立教大学")]*[[14]](#cite_note-14)
* [Ritsumeikan University](/wiki/Ritsumeikan_University "Ritsumeikan University") — *[Ritsumeikan University Song](/w/index.php?title=Ritsumeikan_University_Song&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ritsumeikan University Song (page does not exist)") [[ja](https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E7%AB%8B%E5%91%BD%E9%A4%A8%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6#校歌 "ja:立命館大学")]*[[15]](#cite_note-15)
* [Waseda University](/wiki/Waseda_University "Waseda University") — *[Miyako no Seihoku](https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/ja:%E9%83%BD%E3%81%AE%E8%A5%BF%E5%8C%97 "s:ja:都の西北")*[[16]](#cite_note-16)

## New Zealand

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: New Zealand")]

* [Auckland Grammar School](/wiki/Auckland_Grammar_School "Auckland Grammar School") — *Per Angusta Ad Augusta* set to the music of [A Mighty Fortress is Our God](/wiki/A_Mighty_Fortress_is_Our_God "A Mighty Fortress is Our God")
* [Dilworth School](/wiki/Dilworth_School "Dilworth School") — *[St Patrick's Breastplate](/wiki/St_Patrick%27s_Breastplate "St Patrick's Breastplate")*

## Pakistan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Pakistan")]

* [Pakistan School Song](/wiki/Pakistan_School_Song "Pakistan School Song") — This poem (prayer) was sung as school song in almost all the Pakistani schools.

## Scotland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Scotland")]

* [Royal High School](/wiki/Royal_High_School_(Edinburgh) "Royal High School (Edinburgh)") — *[Vivas Schola Regia](/wiki/Vivas_Schola_Regia "Vivas Schola Regia")*
* [The High School of Glasgow](/wiki/The_High_School_of_Glasgow "The High School of Glasgow") — *O Alma Mater Glorious*

## Sri Lanka

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Sri Lanka")]

* [Royal College, Colombo](/wiki/Royal_College,_Colombo "Royal College, Colombo") — "[School of our Fathers](/wiki/School_of_our_Fathers "School of our Fathers")"
* [St. Anthony's College, Kandy](/wiki/St._Anthony%27s_College,_Kandy "St. Anthony's College, Kandy")  — "Rally Round the Banners of the College"

## United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=List_of_school_songs&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: United States")]

* [College of William and Mary](/wiki/College_of_William_and_Mary "College of William and Mary") — "[Our Alma Mater](/wiki/Our_Alma_Mater "Our Alma Mater")"
* [Cornell University](/wiki/Cornell_University "Cornell University") — "[Far Above Cayuga's Waters](/wiki/Far_Above_Cayuga%27s_Waters "Far Above Cayuga's Waters")"
* [Columbia University](/wiki/Columbia_University "Columbia University") — "[Stand, Columbia](/wiki/Stand,_Columbia "Stand, Columbia")"
* [Harvard University](/wiki/Harvard_University "Harvard University") — "[Fair Harvard](/wiki/Fair_Harvard "Fair Harvard")"
* [Dartmouth College](/wiki/Dartmouth_College "Dartmouth College") — "[Dear Old Dartmouth](/wiki/Dear_Old_Dartmouth "Dear Old Dartmouth")"
* [Ohio State University](/wiki/Ohio_State_University "Ohio State University") — "[Carmen Ohio](/wiki/Carmen_Ohio "Carmen Ohio")"
* [Princeton University](/wiki/Princeton_University "Princeton University") — "[Old Nassau](/wiki/Old_Nassau "Old Nassau")"
* [Pennsylvania State University](/wiki/Pennsylvania_State_University "Pennsylvania State University") — "[Penn State Alma Mater](/wiki/Penn_State_Alma_Mater "Penn State Alma Mater")"
* [Rutgers University](/wiki/Rutgers_University "Rutgers University") — "[On the Banks of the Old Raritan](/wiki/On_the_Banks_of_the_Old_Raritan "On the Banks of the Old Raritan")"
* [San Jose State University](/wiki/San_Jose_State_University "San Jose State University") — "[San José State Alma Mater](/wiki/San_Jos%C3%A9_State_Alma_Mater "San José State Alma Mater")"
* [Syracuse University](/wiki/Syracuse_University "Syracuse University") — "[Syracuse University Alma Mater](/wiki/Syracuse_University_Alma_Mater "Syracuse University Alma Mater")"
* [Texas A&M University](/wiki/Texas_A%26M_University "Texas A&M University") — "[Spirit of Aggieland](/wiki/Spirit_of_Aggieland "Spirit of Aggieland")"

* [University of Nebraska–Lincoln](/wiki/University_of_Nebraska%E2%80%93Lincoln "University of Nebraska–Lincoln") — "[Dear Old Nebraska U](/wiki/Dear_Old_Nebraska_U "Dear Old Nebraska U")," "[Hail Varsity](/wiki/Hail_Varsity "Hail Varsity")"

* [University of North Dakota](/wiki/University_of_North_Dakota "University of North Dakota") — "[UND Alma Mater](/wiki/UND_Alma_Mater "UND Alma Mater")"

* [University of Pennsylvania](/wiki/University_of_Pennsylvania "University of Pennsylvania") — “[Hail, Pennsylvania!](/wiki/Hail,_Pennsylvania! "Hail, Pennsylvania!")”, ”[The Red and Blue](/wiki/The_Red_and_Blue "The Red and Blue")”
